description: Create a fully constrained 2D kinematic skeleton of a single-stage scissor lift mechanism to find the exact extended height given a base width and arm length. The mechanism consists of two rigid crossed arms, each with a total end-to-end length of 260.0 mm, pivoting exactly at their midpoints. Constrain the bottom-left endpoint to the origin (0, 0) and the bottom-right endpoint to the positive horizontal X-axis with a horizontal distance of 100.0 mm between them. The sketch must be fully constrained (0 DOF) without explicitly dimensioning the height or vertical positions, as the vertical extension must be derived purely by the solver's geometric logic. Save the file as ~/Documents/SolveSpace/scissor_lift.slvs.
